name: Identiv, Inc.
business: The IoT Business segment develops, manufactures, and supplies specialty IoT solutions tailored for the healthcare, logistics, smart packaging industries and other high-value end markets. These specialty RFID IoT devices, including NFC, HF, UHF and BLE technology, are attached to or embedded into physical items to provide a unique digital identity.

exposures.sentence: The IoT Business segment develops, manufactures, and supplies specialty IoT solutions tailored for the healthcare, logistics, smart packaging industries and other high-value end markets.
The IoT Business segment develops, manufactures, and supplies specialty IoT solutions tailored for the healthcare, logistics, smart packaging industries and other high-value end markets.
We sell our products across multiple industries, focusing on pharmaceutical and medical devices, consumer electronics, mobile devices, wine and spirits, luxury goods, libraries, and logistics.

These specialty RFID IoT devices, including NFC, HF, UHF and BLE technology are attached to or embedded into physical items, such as medical device consumables, pill containers, wine bottles, consumer appliances, and sports jerseys, providing those items with a unique digital identity.

catalysts.event: Completed transition of RFID production to Thailand facility
catalysts.sentence: At the end of the second quarter of 2025, we completed the transition of all of our RFID inlay, tag, and label production to our new state of the art manufacturing facility in Thailand and discontinued production in our manufacturing facility in Singapore.

catalysts.event: Completed all shut down activities at Singapore facility
catalysts.sentence: We completed all shut down activities in the Singapore site by end of fourth quarter of 2025.
